runtime_evidence.subscribe_payload: non-empty assets_ids payload produced from tracked asset mapping
runtime_evidence.sse_observation: positions_mark route still returned fallback-shaped payload with no stream-backed marks
runtime_evidence.dashboard_log_observation: no market_stream runtime event evidence currently exposed in dashboard.log

exact_gap: The zero-subscription blocker is fixed, but there is still no proof of runtime websocket ingress. Without any market_stream observability, the remaining ambiguity is whether the websocket is not opening, not receiving messages, or receiving unparsed messages.
tiny_fix_needed_if_continuing: Add minimal runtime observability in core/market_stream.py (connection opened, subscribe payload, first message type, parse/store success) so the remaining ingress failure can be identified precisely.
conclusion: Stage 1 cannot yet be marked complete. Token mapping and subscribe payload are now correct, but true live mark ingress into state_hub/SSE remains unproven.
